A0162.title: Privacy-Preserving Computation Technology Applications
A0162.definition: Using privacy-preserving computation techniques such as MPC and TEE to protect data processing procedures
A0162.description: Privacy-Preserving Computation: Multi-Party Secure Computation; Trusted Execution Environment; Federated Learning; Homomorphic Encryption; Differential Privacy; Secure Multi-Party Computation.
A0162.limitation: Low technology maturity; Significant performance impact; Complex implementation
